overview: DayPlanner is a personal schedule manager that helps you organize work tasks, personal errands, and study sessions. View your day or the full week at a glance, navigate between dates, and filter tasks by category to stay focused.
features: Day and week views with date navigation
Task categories: Work, Personal, Study with color coding
Category filtering to focus on what matters
Timed tasks with start and end times
Add, edit, and delete tasks easily
